headline: GoDaddy : and HOL (Hashgraph Online) Propose Open Standards for Verifiable AI Agent Identity on DNS
summary: Founding cohort includes 25+ companies building registries, identity, payments, privacy, and communication for the emerging agent economy HOL today announced the launch of the HOL...
